description: The same office address appears in three sessions with street abbreviation, postal-style expansion, and mixed punctuation. Noise includes another Springfield mention without a street number. Tests whether location extraction collapses formatting variants into one place entity.

messages.content: Ship the prototype handoff kit to 123 Main St, Springfield. Use overnight service only if it misses the truck cutoff.
Shipping instructions captured: 123 Main St, Springfield; overnight only if truck cutoff missed.
Unrelated research: list three US cities named Springfield without tying them to our shipment.
Examples include Springfield, Illinois; Springfield, Missouri; and Springfield, Massachusetts.
Facilities confirmed the receiving dock address as 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL for carrier manifests.
Dock address updated for carriers: 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL.
Draft an out-of-office reply for me. Do not include any street addresses.
OOO draft: I am away with limited email access and will respond after my return.
The notary packet lists the site as 123 Main St., Springfield Illinois on page two.
Noted for records: notary packet lists site at 123 Main St., Springfield Illinois.
We are visiting a client near Oak Street in Springfield this afternoon. Totally separate from the dock.
Acknowledged: separate client visit near Oak Street, Springfield, unrelated to the dock shipment context.
What is the canonical office or dock address we have been using for 123 Main in Springfield, stated once in a single normalized line?

memory_events.value: 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL (dock / receiving; formatting variants normalized)

probe.prompt: What is the canonical office or dock address we have been using for 123 Main in Springfield, stated once in a single normalized line?

ground_truth.current_value: 123 Main Street, Springfield, IL (single location; St/St./Street and Illinois vs IL are formatting variants of the same address)

eval_rubric.notes: Pass if one canonical address is returned and variants are not reported as separate locations. ZIP may be omitted unless inferable; Oak Street visit must not merge. Fail if multiple 123 Main entities or conflation with unrelated Springfield pins.

interference.description: Multiple Springfields exist nationally; generic Springfield lists and Oak Street Springfield visit are geographic near-duplicates that must not merge with 123 Main.
Main St versus Main Street versus Main St. are formatting near-duplicates for the same dock address and should dedupe to one location entity.
